__schema__: Per-campaign narrative + bug-to-fix lineage. Authored by AI NHI. When a new campaign lands, append a block. Fields: headline, verdict, what_it_tested, what_it_proved, for_non_technical, for_c_level, for_sme, bugs[{title, impact, root_cause, fixed_in}], next_run_change.

__audience_framing__.non_technical: Plain language analogies. What the run means for someone who relies on AI agents working together through ai-memory but doesn't read code.
__audience_framing__.c_level: Risk, cost, compliance, audit, velocity. What business outcome does this run buy down or expose? What decision should leadership make?
__audience_framing__.sme: Invariants proven, file paths, specific mechanisms, why the test measured what it measured. No hand-waving.
